name: Dr. Ramesh Kumar
about: Experienced cardiologist dedicated to providing comprehensive and compassionate heart care. Specializing in advanced diagnostics, interventional procedures, and preventative cardiology to ensure optimal patient outcomes.

testimonials.name: Arjun S.
testimonials.review: Dr. Ramesh is incredible. His thorough approach and clear explanations gave me great confidence in my treatment plan.

testimonials.name: Priya M.
testimonials.review: The clinic staff is highly professional, and Dr. Ramesh's expertise is evident from the first consultation. Highly recommend!
